name: @the-new-fuse/chrome-extension
description: The New Fuse Chrome Extension - Enterprise AI Bridge for Browser Integration

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run generate-icons && npm run copy-files
scripts.copy-files: mkdir -p dist && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp *.js dist/ && cp *.html dist/ && cp *.css dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../the-new-fuse-chrome-extension-$(date +%Y%m%d).zip . && cd .. && echo 'Package created!'
scripts.dev: npm run build && echo 'Extension ready! Load the dist folder as an unpacked extension in Chrome'
scripts.validate: node -e "const m = require('./manifest.json'); console.log('Manifest valid:', m.name, 'v' + m.version)"

author: The New Fuse Team
